description_for_human: Run governed read-only Databricks analytics actions.
description_for_model: Use this plugin for approved Databricks read-only analytics questions, governed dataset descriptions, and summary retrieval from curated views.

functions.name: run_readonly_databricks_query
functions.description: Run a read-only Databricks query against approved views and return summarized results.

question.description: Natural language analytics question to translate into a governed read-only query.

catalog.description: Optional approved catalog or domain hint.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

functions.name: describe_databricks_dataset
functions.description: Describe an approved Databricks dataset, view, or semantic layer object.

dataset_name.description: Name of the approved dataset or view.

returns.description: Structured response from the remote MCP server.

tools.name: run_readonly_databricks_query
tools.description: Run a read-only Databricks query against approved views and return summarized results.

catalog.description: Optional approved catalog or domain hint.

tools.name: describe_databricks_dataset
tools.description: Describe an approved Databricks dataset, view, or semantic layer object.

dataset_name.description: Name of the approved dataset or view.
